case_title: HEALTHWELL, INC VS. LITKE PROPERTIES, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY HEALTHWELL, INC AS TO DEFENDANT LITKE PROPERTIES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY HEALTHWELL, INC LITKE PROPERTIES, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEALTHWELL, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITKE PROPERTIES, INC $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,080.00, THE COURT FINDS ANY AGREEMENT WHICH MAY HAVE EXISTED WAS RESCINDED BY MUTUAL AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES, AND COULD NOT BE REVIVED UNILATERALLY BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LITKE PROPERTIES, INC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED APR-02-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LITKE PROPERTIES, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEALTHWELL, INC
